text: # POSTGIS - GESTIONE GRIGLIATI [nttps://postgis.net/docs/ST_Transforn. htnl] (https://postgis.net/docs/ST_Transforn. html) aql UPDATE spatial_ref_sys SET projdtext = '+proj=longlat +ellps=clrkss +nadgrids=gconus, G laska, Gntv2_0.gsb,@ntvl_can.dat,null +no_defs’ WHERE srid = 4267; [nttp://blog.mackerron. con/2012/07/03/0stn02-for-postgis/] (http://blog.nackerron. con/2012/07/03/0stn02-for-postgis/) > 0n linux systems, T know the GSB files must go into the +x/usr/share/proje+ directory Copiati file su postgis.regione. liguria. it Grant per insert/update GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON TABLE public.spatial_ref_sys T0 viscarto; Definito nuovo sistema di coordinate #9999k per effettuare prove aql INSERT INTO public.spatial_ref_sys (srid, auth_name, auth_srid, srtext, projétext) VALUES ( 99999, “EPSG!, 99999, *PROJCS ["Honte Mario / Italy zone 1',GEOGCS ["Monte Mario",DATUM["Monte Mario",SPHEROID[*International 1924" 6378388, 297, AUTHORTTY ["EPSG" , "7022" |, TONGS84 [-104.1,749..1,-9.9,0.571,-2.517,0.714,-11.68] , AUTHORITY ["EPSG", "6265 “1, PRIMEM["Greenwich", 8, AUTHORITY ["EPSG" , "8901"] ], UNIT ["degree" ,0.0174532925199433, AUTHORITY ["EPSG", 912211 , AUTHORITY ["EPSG","4265"]],PROJECTION ["Transverse_Mercator"], PARANETER [ Latitude_of_origin",0] ,PARANETER["cent ral_neridian",9], PA RAMETER["scale_factor",0.9996] , PARAMETER ["false_easting",1500000] , PARATETER " false_northing",0],NIT ["netre" , 1, AUTHORTT Y["EPSG", "900171] ,AXIS ["X", EAST] , AXTS ["Y" NORTH] , AUTHORITY ["EPSG", "999999" 1", *+projtnerc +1at_0=0 +lon_0-3.000000000 +k=0.999600 +x_0=1500000 +y_0-0 +ellps=intl +nadgr ids=@195.gsb, §196. gsb, 8197 .gsb, @211.gsb, €212. gsb, @213. gsb, €214.5b, @215. gsb, €216.05b, 0228. gsb, €229.9sb, ©230.gsb, & 231.gsb,0232.gsb, @233..95b, €343.5b, G244. gsb, €245. g5b, @246. gsb, @247 . g5b, @248. b, 6249. 95, 257 g5b, €258 gsb, 0259 5b, 627 0.0b,6271.5b,nuLL +units=n +no_defs’ ) TEST SU ALCUNI PUNTI [nttp://srvcarto. regione.
